summary: Implemented constellation connection lines overlay system (US-055). Created a CPU-side O(n²) proximity search that runs at init to find nearby point pairs within a configurable threshold, bounded by maxConnections globally and 5 neighbors per point. Line segments are rendered via THREE.LineSegments with a custom ShaderMaterial that applies the same noise-based warp transform as the point systems (importing noise3d.glsl), ensuring lines track deformed positions. Fragment shader applies distance-based opacity fade, bass-driven visibility modulation, treble brightness shimmer, and atmospheric depth fog. Added enableConstellationLines and maxConstellationSegments to QualityProfile (low: disabled, medium: 1500, high: 3000). Extended ModeManager with overlay attachment support that rebuilds the constellation on mode transitions. All 30 new tests pass, all 1118 existing tests pass, build succeeds.
